_critical_finding: Dev and prod App Services run DIFFERENT operating systems. design.md §2.4 'App Service is unambiguously Linux' is wrong for dev.
_implication_for_fr_a1: FR-A1 (publish --runtime linux-x64) is correct for prod but WRONG for dev. Phase 2 candidate categorization must address this.

prod.name: spaarke-bff-prod
prod._note: Linux App Service per design's stated assumption
